flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at College of San Mateo rose 33% between 2007 and 2010 ($2.6k → $3.5k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at College of San Mateo fell 26% between 2009 and 2010 (17.0% → 12.5%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at College of San Mateo fell 15% between 2007 and 2010 (24.7% → 21.1%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at College of San Mateo rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.1k → $11.4k).
